content: TASK-059 checkpoint done: Added a ready-to-open ScreenFlow transition-map sample at examples/screenflow-map.html. It loads examples/screenflow.archmap through <archmap-viewer base-view="prototype"> and starts in the Prototype Map surface where screen SVGs are connected by transition arrows, with Map/Play switching and controls enabled. README and DELIVERY now point to the sample and note the CDN import-map equivalent. Verification: npm run build, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/examples/screenflow-map.html confirmed 8 screen cards, 8 arrows, Map/Play controls, prototype base-view attribute, and no console errors. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
